info.title: VerdictCouncil API
info.summary: Judicial AI decision-support system with 9-agent pipeline
info.description:
VerdictCouncil processes judicial cases through a multi-agent pipeline covering case intake, evidence analysis, fact reconstruction, legal knowledge, argument construction, deliberation, and verdict generation.

**Authentication:** Cookie-based JWT. Call `POST /api/v1/auth/login` to receive an httpOnly `vc_token` cookie.

**Note:** Swagger UI does not support cookie-based auth for interactive testing. Use a separate HTTP client (curl, httpx) for authenticated requests.

post.description: Create a new user account with the specified role. Returns the created user profile (without password).

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests/minute per client IP)

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

post.description: Verify credentials and set an httpOnly `vc_token` JWT cookie. The cookie is valid for 24 hours.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests/minute per client IP)

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

post.description: Delete the `vc_token` cookie to end the session.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded (60 requests/minute per client IP)

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

get.description: Returns authenticated user and session expiry.

post.description: Rotates the JWT cookie and extends session expiry.

post.description: Generate a password reset token and email the link. Always returns 200 to avoid email enumeration. If SMTP is not configured the link is logged server-side at WARNING level for manual delivery.

post.summary: Consume a password reset token and set a new password
post.description: Validates the reset token, sets the user's new password, and marks the token as used. Tokens are single-use and expire after the configured TTL.

AuditLogSummary.description: Lightweight audit log entry for case detail view.

CaseCreateRequest.description: Create a new case for processing.

decision_type.description: accept, modify, reject, or amendment type

case_id.description: Case ID duplicate for client compatibility

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: ID of the user who created the case

CaseDetailResponse.title: CaseDetailResponse
CaseDetailResponse.description: Full case with all related entities.

valid.title: Valid
valid.description: Whether the case passed jurisdiction checks

case_id.title: Case Id
case_id.description: Case ID duplicate for client compatibility

created_by.title: Created By
created_by.description: ID of the user who created the case

total_cases.title: Total Cases
total_cases.description: Total number of cases in the system

average_processing_time_seconds.title: Average Processing Time Seconds
average_processing_time_seconds.description: Average pipeline processing time when available

DashboardStats.title: DashboardStats
DashboardStats.description: Aggregate case statistics and system health.

final_order.title: Final Order
final_order.description: Final order text if modifying the verdict

DecisionRequest.title: DecisionRequest
DecisionRequest.description: Judge decision on a case verdict.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Judge reason for modify or reject decisions

action.description: Action to take on the escalated case

final_order.title: Final Order
final_order.description: Final order text — required when action is manual_decision

linked_claims.title: Linked Claims
linked_claims.description: Linked claims, contradictions, or corroboration metadata

verdict_fairness_report.title: Verdict Fairness Report
verdict_fairness_report.description: Fairness report stored in the verdict record

governance_checks.title: Governance Checks
governance_checks.description: Fairness check outputs from governance agent audit logs

has_fairness_data.title: Has Fairness Data
has_fairness_data.description: Whether any fairness data exists for this case

application.title: Application
application.description: Narrative application to the case facts

failure_count.title: Failure Count
failure_count.description: Current failure count (-1 if Redis unavailable)

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if Redis is unavailable

PairHealthResponse.title: PairHealthResponse
PairHealthResponse.description:
PAIR API circuit breaker status.

Returns different optional fields depending on whether Redis is available.
Normal: service, state, failure_count, failure_threshold, recovery_timeout_seconds, opened_at.
Error path: service, state, failure_count, error.

PairProbeResponse.title: PairProbeResponse
PairProbeResponse.description:
PAIR API active probe result.

Healthy: {status, response_code}. Unhealthy: {status, error}.

email.title: Email
email.description: Email address to send the reset link to

PasswordResetVerifyBody.title: PasswordResetVerifyBody
PasswordResetVerifyBody.description: Consume a password reset token and set a new password.

distinguishing_factors.title: Distinguishing Factors
distinguishing_factors.description: How the precedent differs from the current case

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: Approve or reject the reopen request

perturbations_held.title: Perturbations Held
perturbations_held.description: Number of perturbations that held the verdict

ValidationErrorResponse.title: ValidationErrorResponse
ValidationErrorResponse.description: FastAPI validation error response (422 Unprocessable Entity).

amendment_of.title: Amendment Of
amendment_of.description: Previous verdict in the amendment chain

WhatIfRequest.title: WhatIfRequest
WhatIfRequest.description: Submit a what-if modification for a case.

original_run_id.title: Original Run Id
original_run_id.description: Run ID of the original pipeline execution

scenario_run_id.title: Scenario Run Id
scenario_run_id.description: Run ID of the modified pipeline execution

WhatIfResultResponse.title: WhatIfResultResponse
WhatIfResultResponse.description: Full what-if scenario result with verdict diff.

cookieAuth.name: vc_token
cookieAuth.description: JWT token set via httpOnly cookie on login. Call POST /api/v1/auth/login to obtain the cookie.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: User registration, login/logout, and session management. Authentication uses JWT tokens stored in httpOnly cookies.

tags.name: cases
tags.description: CRUD operations for judicial cases. Role-based access: clerks and judges create cases; admins see all.

tags.name: decisions
tags.description: Judge decision recording (accept, modify, or reject). Cases must be in `ready_for_review` status.

tags.name: what-if
tags.description: Contestable Judgment Mode: submit hypothetical case modifications and measure verdict stability via perturbation analysis.

tags.name: audit
tags.description: Immutable audit trail of all agent actions on a case. Filterable by agent name and time range.

tags.name: dashboard
tags.description: Aggregate case statistics, status breakdowns, and system health overview.

tags.name: health
tags.description: PAIR API circuit breaker status and active probing for external service health.

tags.name: hearing-notes
tags.description: Judge-private hearing annotations: create, list, edit, lock, delete.

tags.name: hearing-pack
tags.description: Generate a hearing preparation pack (summary, evidence, arguments, verdict).

tags.name: reopen-requests
tags.description: Party-initiated reopen workflow: submit, list, and review requests.

tags.name: senior-inbox
tags.description: Senior judge inbox: items awaiting review across cases.

tags.name: admin
tags.description: Administrative operations: vector store refresh, user actions, cost config.
